name: library-card
title: Library Card
description: Compact 3-up library card from the Add Widget panel's Predefined and User Define galleries. A teal icon over a widget name and an uppercase type sub-label; clicking it drops that saved widget onto the dashboard. Refined into a real button with hover lift, focus ring, a selected/current state and a disabled treatment. Lay them out via .oo-library-card-grid.
